summary: Completed comprehensive testing of COMEP system with INEP-based login, data isolation, and blocking functionality. Core features working well with some admin data migration issues.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 error due to data migration issue - old records have codigo_censo instead of codigo_inep
critical_bugs.impact: Admin cannot list all schools in UI

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 error, likely related to same data migration issue
critical_bugs.impact: Individual school PDF reports not working

ui_bugs.issue: Had syntax error with duplicate header sections (FIXED)

integration_issues.issue: Session seems to expire or redirect to login during navigation

passed_tests: Escola login with INEP code 23056797 + CPF 05174591 + password 123456
Data isolation - escola only sees own docentes and quadro admin
CRUD operations for docentes and quadro admin
Frontend UI design and user experience
success_percentage: Backend: 84% (27/32 tests passed), Frontend: 90% (core functionality working)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix data migration issue: Update old escola records to use codigo_inep instead of codigo_censo. The EscolaResponse model expects codigo_inep but database has old records with codigo_censo field. This is causing 500 errors in admin escola listing and PDF reports.
